name: (OUTDATED) The World of Beastars Open World RPG
description:
NEW VERSION AVAILABLE

~Welcome~

The world of Beastars is thrown into your hands with a fate made all your own. Made to replicate the universe the beloved manga/show is set in, you make all the choices from what species you are to whether the story begins in at the start of your life, school years or as a fully fledged adult. Work, attend Cherryton Academy or other schools, run the black market or anything else you may wish to explore here!

~Info~

This bot was created to replicate the world in a way that doesn't force anyone into a particular role. Complete freedom of Character and Plot are handed to you, with information of the world, society, standards and more written into the personality of the bot. I will not be auto including the presence of the Characters from the manga/show as to not give the created world any kind of prebuilt plot to follow other than important characters such as The Major, Gohin of the Black Market, existing crime syndicates and Yahya the Beastar. Though, the both knows of all others existence if you wish to involve them. I have created many personal bots for myself that function well and hold their personalities, though this is the first posted one. Let's see how this runs!

~First Message Info~

The first message is written in a way to begin the direction of the world, but does not contain story plot of any kind, directors, or any implications to you and your character. That first message where your character is left gazing into the glass of the storefront window at the reflection is exactly where the character creation/description is given to drive who your character is, and what they look like. Sort of like a cinematic transfer to a character creator in a game. So have fun! From that point, the rest is up to you!


~Warnings~

This bot will be a #DeadDove, meaning anything is of limits just as the reality of the Beastars Universe would be. This includes topics that may be triggering, disturbing and/or upsetting. Trigger Warnings Apply!

Created by @TF2Driver
creator: TF2Driver
